userMessage: Source 3.3V current limit 100mA output on then measure current

warnings: Detected over-concatenated SCPI command strings; split into grouped steps (max 3 per step).

response.text:
Built a verified Keithley 2450 flow for sourcing 3.3 V with a 100 mA current limit, turning output on, and measuring current.

ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Create a new verified pyvisa flow for Keithley 2450 SMU to source 3.3 V, limit current to 0.1 A, enable output, and read current.","findings":[],"suggestedFixes":["Auto-repaired missing/duplicate step ids in replace_flow actions for apply compatibility.","Long semicolon command chains were split and grouped for readability (max 3 commands per step).","Filled connect/disconnect instrumentIds with workspace alias \"smu1\" for direct chat apply compatibility."],"actions":[{"type":"replace_flow","flow":{"name":"Keithley 2450 Source 3.3V and Measure Current","description":"Sources 3.3 V with 100 mA current protection, turns output on, and measures DC current.","backend":"pyvisa","deviceType":"SMU","steps":[{"type":"connect","label":"Connect","params":{"instrumentIds":["smu1"],"printIdn":true},"id":"s1_1"},{"id":"g_concat_qg5c07","type":"group","label":"Configure Source and Sense","params":{},"collapsed":false,"children":[{"type":"write","label":"Configure Source and Sense","params":{"command":":SOURce:FUNCtion VOLTage"},"id":"s1_2"},{"type":"write","label":"Configure Source and Sense","params":{"command":":SOURce:VOLTage:LEVel 3.3"},"id":"cmd_t6zlx2"},{"type":"write","label":"Configure Source and Sense","params":{"command":":SENSe:CURRent:PROTection 0.1"},"id":"cmd_cqporh"},{"type":"write","label":"Configure Source and Sense","params":{"command":":SENSe:FUNCtion \"CURRent\""},"id":"cmd_yzhv61"}]},{"type":"write","label":"Enable Output","params":{"command":":OUTPut:STATe ON"},"id":"s1_3"},{"type":"query","label":"Measure Current","params":{"command":":MEASure:CURRent:DC?","saveAs":"smu_current"},"id":"s1_4"},{"type":"disconnect","label":"Disconnect","params":{"instrumentIds":["smu1"]},"id":"s1_5"}]}}]}

actionsJson.summary: Create a new verified pyvisa flow for Keithley 2450 SMU to source 3.3 V, limit current to 0.1 A, enable output, and read current.
suggestedFixes: Auto-repaired missing/duplicate step ids in replace_flow actions for apply compatibility.
Long semicolon command chains were split and grouped for readability (max 3 commands per step).
Filled connect/disconnect instrumentIds with workspace alias "smu1" for direct chat apply compatibility.

flow.name: Keithley 2450 Source 3.3V and Measure Current
flow.description: Sources 3.3 V with 100 mA current protection, turns output on, and measures DC current.
